message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.transpose (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.transpose:

- transpose_homogeneous_int: 2-row 3-col int frame -> 3-row 2-col
  (rows become columns, columns become rows)
- transpose_homogeneous_float: 3-row 2-col float frame -> 2-row 3-col

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.transpose()), runs the Rust DataFrame.transpose(), and asserts
parity via compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameTranspose was already
wired through the Frame response branch; this fills the live-oracle
test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-qbei2]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
